In this paper, we use a novel approach to estimate Doppler stretch and time delay in fractional Fourier transform (FRFT) domain. We also develop two sub-array models to accurately estimate the direction-of-departure (DOD) and the direction-of-arrival (DOA). Furthermore, the Crame\u0301r-Rao bound for target parameter estimation is derived and computed in closed form.
